subcodes.first_line: O Beauty! Upon Thee be My glory, and upon them that love Thee and remember Thee for My sake, and praise Thee with that which hath been revealed from the Pen of My Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال علیک بهائی و علی من یحبک و یذکرک لوجهی و یثنیک بما نزل من قلم امری
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
